# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
services:
  - name: service1
    url: http://service1.example.com
    tags:
      - api-management

  - name: service2
    url: http://service2.example.com
    tags:
      - api-management

upstreams:
  - name: upstream1
    slots: 10
    healthchecks:
      active:
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 302
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeout: 1
          interval: 3

routes:
  - name: route1
    paths:
      - /service1/*
    service: service1
    strip_path: true
    tags:
      - api-management

  - name: route2
    paths:
      - /service2/*
    service: service2
    strip_path: true
    tags:
      - api-management
